description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Step 1: Prep Release that can be triggered manually with inputs for version specifier, branch, post version specifier, activity since date or reference, and since last stable tag. In an ubuntu-latest job with write repository permissions, set up the environment, then use the prep-release action from jupyter_releaser to prepare a release based on the provided inputs, and finally print a message with a link to review the draft release.
